title: brainstorm/planner now dispatch on pi runtime (was claude-code)
rationale: Operator request 2026-05-22 to move the interactive Plot scouts off claude-code onto pi. Safe because the read-only (brainstorm) and .plot/.seeds-only (planner) contract is enforced in the system prompt, not by the underlying runtime — burrow_config only forwards [sandbox].network. Tradeoff: pi is a multi-provider runtime so the model identity behind these agents now depends on pi's provider config rather than implicitly Anthropic. Follow-up warren-b802 will lift this to a .warren/config.yaml knob so operators don't need to fork warren to flip it again.

description: auto_plan_run string/boolean trap: canopy's cn create/update --fm key=value stringifies all values, but warren's reap gate is strict (frontmatter.auto_plan_run === true, src/runs/reap/auto-plan-run.ts:14). Any canopy-authored agent setting auto_plan_run via --fm silently loses plan auto-dispatch. Warren's own project-tier nightwatch override carried the string form until hand-fixed in .canopy/prompts.jsonl (2026-06-11).
resolution: Hand-edit the canopy store value to a JSON boolean and verify with cn render <name> --json; durable fix is warren-side coercion of 'true'/'false' strings (warren-5f07).

title: Audit population: three constitution-enforcing cron auditors with asymmetric autonomy
rationale: Forensic audit of merged history (PR #270 title/diff mismatch, 1.3pt silent coverage decay, grandfather-at-birth, gates-green prod break) showed drift lives around the gates, not in them — so auditors map to failure classes, not gates. Mechanical auditors get auto_plan_run dispatch authority immediately; the judgment auditor (tastewatch) must earn it via tracked precision, mirroring the operator's own gate-to-auditor transition.
